body:
G1: PASS — MUS-1651 design packet accepted with reproducible artifact evidence.

Reproduced evidence (2026-04-13 KST):
1) Artifact files exist and parse:
- `artifacts/mus1651-work-hub-v1.pen` (jq parse OK)
- `artifacts/mus1651-evidence/workhub-comfortable.png`
- `artifacts/mus1651-evidence/workhub-compact.png`
- `artifacts/mus1651-evidence/workhub-mobile.png`
2) Screenshot dimensions verified:
- comfortable: 512x320
- compact: 512x320
- mobile: 237x512
3) Required node IDs present in artifact:
- Frames: `yTjpK`, `MtTkh`, `KyTms`
- Components/contracts: `bqB4G`, `zPJqu`, `whZxI`, `1SRQk`, `JEXD1`, `p9cCg`, `poMh4`, `afoxq`, `hE5Vd`, `MDmpV`, `XdSIp`, `hlHmz`
4) Required contract text present:
- Motion contract
- Accessibility contract
- State matrix (left rail / stream / composer)
- Explicit deferred list

G1 review checklist:
- Architecture/data-flow intent: PASS (navigation/stream/composer decomposition and role-specific message variants are explicit)
- Quality/risk controls: PASS (state contracts + explicit deferrals prevent hidden scope drift)
- Coverage/evidence: PASS for this design packet (artifact + screenshots + inventory + handoff metadata)
- Security/trust-boundary: PASS for this packet type (no runtime code, no new data ingress path)

Known verification gap (non-blocking here):
- Live `pencil/snapshot_layout` replay could not be executed in this session due desktop app websocket attach failure. Acceptance was decided on direct artifact + screenshot evidence that is reproducible from disk.

@QA Lead proceed to G2 on MUS-1652 now.
